overall.description: Game engine footage from a flooded amusement park area at blue hour. The camera moves slowly through green-tinted flood water past a large roller coaster structure, briefly explores a dark graffiti-covered corridor under a building, then returns to the open flooded plaza near the Grand Imperial Mall.

entered.detail: large metal roller coaster structure silhouetted against the blue sky
dark concrete building wall rising from the flood water
green-tinted flood water covering the ground with ripples
silhouettes of distant buildings on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a flooded amusement park at blue hour, with the camera moving through green-tinted water toward a massive roller coaster structure silhouetted on the left. A dark concrete building wall dominates the right side while the distant city skyline is visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered walkway under building with graffiti mural

events.description: turns right and enters a dark covered corridor under the concrete building
turns left and exits the dark corridor back to the open flooded area

agents.ego_description: navigating into a narrow dark passage with skull graffiti on the wall, then turning to exit

low overhead concrete structure blocking the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a dark, narrow corridor beneath the building, revealing a prominent skull graffiti mural on the concrete wall. The space is enclosed with low ceilings blocking the sky, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere before the camera turns left to exit back to the open water.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded plaza with roller coaster and mall building

agents.ego_description: continuing to swim through the flooded plaza alongside the roller coaster structure

entered.detail: large building with illuminated signage identifying it as Grand Imperial Mall
roller coaster structure becomes visible again as camera exits the corridor

segments.scene_description: Back in the open flooded plaza, the camera continues moving through the water with the roller coaster structure visible on the left. The Grand Imperial Mall building dominates the right side, identified by on-screen text. The scene remains in the blue hour lighting with the green flood water extending toward distant amusement park structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a flooded amusement park that shifts from an open plaza into a claustrophobic underpass before returning to a wide urban vista. It begins by gliding through green-tinted water toward a massive roller coaster silhouette, with a dark concrete wall on the right and a distant city skyline ahead. As the camera turns right, the open sky vanishes and the scene shifts into a narrow, dark corridor beneath a building, where a prominent skull graffiti mural lines the concrete wall. The camera then turns left to exit the enclosed space, returning to the open floodwaters as the environment expands once more. Finally, the view opens up to reveal the Grand Imperial Mall dominating the right side while the roller coaster remains visible on the left under the dim blue hour light.
